allow: Bash(timeout 10 nvim . -c 'redir >> /tmp/nvim_messages.txt | messages | redir END | qa')
Bash(nvim . -c 'redir! > /tmp/nvim_debug.txt | silent messages | redir END | qa')
Bash(nvim . -c 'lua vim.defer_fn\(function\(\) local f = io.open\(""/tmp/nvim_test_ok.txt"",""w""\); f:write\(""OK""\); f:close\(\); vim.cmd\(""qa""\) end, 3000\)')
Bash(TERM=xterm-256color nvim . +'lua vim.defer_fn\(function\(\) local f = io.open\(""""/tmp/nvim_test2.txt"""",""""w""""\) f:write\(""""OK""""\) f:close\(\) vim.cmd\(""""qa""""\) end, 2000\)')

Bash(TERM=xterm-256color nvim /Users/rrmartins/Documents/projs/gruvi-player-ss +'lua vim.defer_fn\(function\(\) local f = io.open\(""/tmp/nvim_gruvi.txt"",""w""\) f:write\(""OK""\) f:close\(\) vim.cmd\(""qa""\) end, 3000\)')
Bash(timeout 8 nvim . --headless +'lua vim.defer_fn\(function\(\) print\(""NVIM_OK""\) vim.cmd\(""qa""\) end, 2000\)')
Bash(timeout 8 nvim +'lua vim.defer_fn\(function\(\) print\(""""OK""""\) vim.cmd\(""""qa""""\) end, 2000\)')

Bash(timeout 10 nvim . +'lua vim.defer_fn\(function\(\) local ok, err = pcall\(function\(\) print\(""""running""""\) end\) local f = io.open\(""""/tmp/nvim_gruvi3.txt"""",""""w""""\) f:write\(tostring\(ok\) .. """" """" .. tostring\(err\)\) f:close\(\) vim.cmd\(""""qa!""""\) end, 3000\)')
